scripts.dev: convex dev --once && concurrently -r 'pnpm --filter pub-web dev' 'pnpm run dev:db'
scripts.lint: biome check AGENTS.md CLAUDE.md FUTURE.md README.md biome.json knip.json package.json convex docs shared skills web && pnpm --filter pub-web lint
scripts.lint:fix: biome check --fix AGENTS.md CLAUDE.md FUTURE.md README.md biome.json knip.json package.json convex docs shared skills web
scripts.format: biome format --write AGENTS.md CLAUDE.md FUTURE.md README.md biome.json knip.json package.json convex docs shared skills web
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm knip
